description: Bounded working memory for coding agents — typed nodes, current-vs-stale state, MCP-mountable.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.razroo/state-trace

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite or JSON file backing the working-memory graph. .db/.sqlite/.sqlite3 = SQLite (recommended); other = JSON. Defaults to ~/.state-trace/memory.db.
environmentVariables.name: STATE_TRACE_STORAGE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Namespace to scope reads and writes (e.g. the repo slug). Nodes without a namespace remain visible to all namespaces.
environmentVariables.name: STATE_TRACE_NAMESPACE

environmentVariables.description: Working-memory budget in capacity units. Default 256.
environmentVariables.name: STATE_TRACE_CAPACITY_LIMIT

runtimeArguments.description: Install with the [mcp] extra to pull the mcp SDK alongside state-trace.
runtimeArguments.name: extras

title: state-trace
